FunctionsQuickstartDotNetAzd_description: A full .NET (isolated worker) Azure Functions project wired for the Azure Developer CLI (azd): HTTP-triggered functions, Bicep infrastructure, and dev-container/VS Code configuration.
trigger_functionName_help: The name of the HTTP function. Must start with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters or underscores.
trigger_functionName_errorText: Function names must start with a letter, end with a letter or number, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores (max 128 chars).
